$comment: c78 (fp_to_ui, 2026-07-01): (unsigned)double gains an x86 encoding identical to fp_to_si (F2 REX.W 0F 2C = cvttsd2si) + threads the source float width; a value in [0,2^32) reads exactly into the low 32 bits (byte-identical to gcc's cvttsd2si rax,xmm0). Pre-fix fp_to_ui had NO encoding -> A_NoEncodingDeclared. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the encoding block -> A_NoEncodingDeclared fp_to_ui. x86-ONLY: arm64 declares no fp_to_ui opcode (a clean L_RequiredLirOpcodeMissing fail-loud) -> arm64/darwin legs are a deferred future cycle (native FCVTZU), so this witness omits them. => 42.
